reasoning: SPY at 744.07, positioned in the upper half of premarket range (742.31 PML → 744.70 PMH). Price is 0.63 below the premarket high at 744.70 (Active, 2★ resistance), testing it from below. The battle level is 744.70 — if it holds on first test, price will retest the 742.31 PML floor ($1.76 room to fall) with potential intermediate support at 743.0. If 744.70 breaks, continuation bullish to Pivot R1 at 745.66. The ribbon is BULL (fast 743.96, spread 54¢), and price has already cleared the prior RTH high at 743.91. Slight bullish bias due to ribbon stack + price position, but immediate decision hinges on PMH hold vs. break.

Ribbon is BULL (spread 54¢, stack healthy) — supports any upside breakout but doesn't override PMH resistance.

Premarket volume is zero across all bars — ultra-light conditions, high volatility risk, low conviction.
notes: The decision point is PMH 744.70. Price is testing it at 06:00 ET in dead-of-night premarket — typical chop until RTH 09:30 ET. The narrowness of the PM range (2.39 wide) and light volume suggest a wide-open day. Battle level PMH should anchor analysis until RTH opens.
